calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard:
PTR-24-307167 The Henry Cartan Trust dated 5/15/1980 FBO Alexandra Bellis Kromelow;
PTR-24-307180 The Henry Cartan Trust dated 5/15/1980 FBO Catherine Bellis Brown;
PTR-24-307223 The Barbara Sesnon Cartan Trust dated 2/25/1987 FBO Catherine B. Brown;
PTR-24-307225 The Barbara Sesnon Cartan Trust #2 dated 2/25/1987 FBO Catherine B. Brown
PTR-24-307227 The Barbara Sesnon Cartan Trust dated 2/25/1987 FBO Alexandra Bellis Kromelow;
and PTR-24-307229 The Barbara Sesnon Cartan Trust #2 dated 2/25/1987 FBO Alexandra Bellis Kromelow.

Appearances: Kirsten Wolff and Paige Voorhees appeared by zoom for Catherine Brown and Alexandra Kromelow.

Mrs. Wolff provided background information, spoke of the family relationships, the establishments of the trusts, the trusts administration, the provisions in the trusts that require court approval of the appointment of a successor trustee, etc. Mrs. Wolff also stated that Mr. Reys is in Seattle and that he is consenting to act as trustee. The Petitions for Order to Modify Trusts (6) are under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.
